name: Metformin IKK/NF-kB SASP cell-model study
summary: A mechanistic study testing whether metformin suppresses SASP-associated inflammatory cytokine expression through IKK/NF-kB pathway modulation.
model_system: Senescence-linked cell systems, conditioned-media assays, AMPK-null fibroblasts, and LPS-stimulated macrophages
